name: Rum Cake Fraccaro
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, combine eggs, dark sugar, and vanilla. Beat over boiling water for 3-4 minutes until mixture thickens and doubles in size.
2. Remove from heat and continue to whip with a mixer on high speed for an additional 8 minutes until the mixture is very thick and pale in color.
3. Gradually fold in sifted flour until fully incorporated.
4. Grease and flour three 9-inch round baking pans. Pour batter into prepared pans, dividing evenly among each pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool cakes on wire racks completely before removing from pans.
CHERRY RUM SYRUP:
Mix together cherry syrup and rum.
PASTILLERA CREAM:
1. Scald milk over low heat.
2. In a small bowl, whisk eggs, granulated sugar, lemon peel, vanilla extract, and all-purpose flour until smooth.
3. Pour the warm milk into the egg mixture, then transfer to the top of a double boiler. Cook over simmering water, stirring constantly for 4-5 minutes until thickened.
4. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
WHIPPED CREAM TOPPING:
1. Fold whipped cream with sugar and vanilla extract until stiff peaks form.
2. Pipe onto the cake layers or spread between layers and over the top and sides of the cooled cake.
3. Optional: Garnish with sliced roasted almonds on the sides.
4. Refrigerate before serving.
